MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT Shipment_Home__dll.Carrier_c__c AS Carrier__c, Shipment_Home__dll.Shipment_Status_c__c AS ShipmentStatus__c, count(Shipment_Home__dll.Id__c) AS ShipmentCount__c, max(Shipment_Home__dll.LastModifiedDate__c) AS LastShipmentUpdate__c FROM Shipment_Home__dll GROUP BY Shipment_Home__dll.Carrier_c__c, Shipment_Home__dll.Shipment_Status_c__c
